weapons.name: Pistol
weapons.traitEffect: Easy to conceal, common backup weapon.

weapons.name: Rifle
weapons.traitEffect: No special trait — consistent and dependable.

weapons.name: Blade
weapons.traitEffect: Can only be used in base contact.

weapons.name: Sniper Rifle
weapons.traitEffect: +1 attack die when shooting beyond range band, instead of the usual penalty.

weapons.name: LMG
weapons.traitEffect: Target suffers -2" movement on their next activation.

weapons.name: Launcher
weapons.traitEffect: All models within 2" of the target point take hits.

weapons.name: Power Weapon
weapons.traitEffect: Target's health die shifts an extra step on a failed health check.

abilities.name: Hardened
abilities.effect: +1 step to GRT die for recovery and morale checks.

abilities.name: CQB Expert
abilities.effect: Gains a bonus attack die in brawls.

abilities.name: Marksman
abilities.effect: Gains a bonus attack die when shooting a target within range band.

abilities.name: Medic
abilities.effect: Use Gear action: roll TEC — on success, attempt recovery on a Down ally in base contact.

abilities.name: Hacker
abilities.effect: Gains a bonus die on TEC checks made for scenario interactions.

abilities.name: Networked
abilities.effect: Once per round, one ally within 6" may re-roll a single failed AWR check.

abilities.name: Stealthy
abilities.effect: Enemies beyond 12" must pass an AWR check before targeting this operative.

abilities.name: Spotter
abilities.effect: Once per round, designate a target: all friendly shooters gain +1 attack die vs. that target this round.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.effect: The first failed health check each game is treated as a pass (health die still degrades one step).

abilities.name: Tactician
abilities.effect: Once per round, swap activation order with one friendly operative.

abilities.name: Rapid Assault
abilities.effect: After a successful Fight action, may immediately move up to 3" (no additional action required).

abilities.name: Pinning Fire
abilities.effect: Shoot action: instead of dealing damage, force the target to pass a GRT check or lose their next action.

abilities.name: Breacher
abilities.effect: Ignores the cover penalty when shooting.

abilities.name: Field Repair
abilities.effect: Use Gear action: roll TEC — on success, restore one health step to a friendly operative in base contact.

abilities.name: Ghost
abilities.effect: When hidden, enemies must pass an AWR check at -1 die to spot this operative.

abilities.name: Heavy Weapons
abilities.effect: May carry one premium weapon without spending a gear slot.

abilities.name: Commander
abilities.effect: All friendly operatives within 6" gain +1 to GRT for morale checks.

behaviorTags.name: Aggressive
behaviorTags.personality: Closes distance aggressively, prefers melee over shooting. Gets into combat as fast as possible.

table.action: Move toward nearest visible enemy. Fight if in base contact.
Move toward nearest enemy. Shoot if in line of sight.
Full move toward nearest enemy. Fight if in contact; otherwise Shoot.

behaviorTags.name: Defensive
behaviorTags.personality: Holds position, shoots from cover. Prioritizes staying behind cover and engaging enemies at range.

table.action: If in cover: Shoot nearest visible enemy. If not in cover: move to nearest available cover.
Hold position. Shoot nearest visible enemy.
Move to better cover within 6". Shoot nearest visible enemy if possible.

behaviorTags.name: Cautious
behaviorTags.personality: Avoids risk and repositions frequently. Maintains maximum range and uses cover to survive.

table.action: Move away from nearest enemy to maintain range. Shoot if able.
Move toward nearest objective. Interact if in contact.
Move to cover with best sight lines. Shoot nearest visible enemy.

behaviorTags.name: Flanker
behaviorTags.personality: Seeks angles and avoids the frontline. Moves to the sides or rear of enemies to attack from unexpected angles.

table.action: Move toward the flank or rear of the nearest enemy. Shoot if in line of sight.
If behind cover with line of sight to enemy rear: Shoot. Otherwise reposition to a better angle.
Move to the closest enemy not currently engaged by a friendly. Shoot or Fight as appropriate.

scenarios.name: Blackout
scenarios.briefing: Seize and hold data relay points in a blacked-out district. Control the nodes and lock out the opposition.

scenarios.name: Extraction
scenarios.briefing: Locate and extract a VIP from a hostile zone before the enemy closes in. Time is against you.

scenarios.name: Scorched Data
scenarios.briefing: Race to hack or destroy enemy terminals before they do the same to yours. Every second counts.

scenarios.name: Dead Drop
scenarios.briefing: Retrieve intel packages scattered across the map and exfil them to your deployment zone. The enemy wants the same packages.

scenarios.name: Signal Jam
scenarios.briefing: Hold the central transmitter for 3 consecutive rounds to broadcast your signal and deny the enemy theirs.

scenarios.name: Sweep & Clear
scenarios.briefing: Eliminate all hostiles in a building complex. Designed for solo and co-op play against the AI.
